products.description: Argentina soccer jersey with Climacool+ technology for a cool and focused performance. The Argentina 26 Home Messi Authentic Jersey unites soccer heritage with forward-thinking design. Marking the first appearance of Argentina’s third World Cup winners’ star, it honors the team’s legacy and fearless identity. Crafted in knit jacquard with a slim, performance fit, it’s built to move with precision.
products.fabricDetails:
- Premium Imported Player Edition
-  Main Material: 100% Polyester (100% Recycled)
-  CLIMACOOL+ technology
-  Sweat-wicking & Quick drying
- Product color: White / Icey Blue / Light BluE

products.description: Authentic jersey with sweat-wicking, quick-drying fabric for comfort. A tribute to the spirit of Argentina, the Argentina 26 Away Authentic Jersey captures the passion and artistry of Argentine culture. With its bold swirling design, the jersey is inspired by popular artistic expressions. Designed for those who live and breathe soccer, it combines style with performance. Climacool+ technology helps you stay fresh, cool, and comfortable throughout your game. Crafted with a higher crew neck, this adidas jersey offers a tailored fit that feels locked-in, thanks to body mapping technology. A heat-applied label and UV-print serve as a seal of authenticity
products.fabricDetails:
-  Premium Imported Player Edition
- Main Material: 100% Polyester(100% Recycled)
-  CLIMACOOL+ technology
- Sweat-wicking & Quick drying
- Jacquard knit fabric
- Product color: Black / Lucid Blue / Blue Burst

products.description: **Nike presents**: Brazil's 2026 Home jersey. One of the most recognizable uniforms in soccer, this kit embodies the country's natural beauty and the squad's energetic style of play.

products.description: This brightly coloured shirt is as beautiful as it is threatening. Like a poison dart frog warning their predators, this Replica Jordan Shirt reminds the other nations that they take on Brazil at their own risk.
